channel.title: Introduction on Cheng Jinying
channel.description: Recent content in Introduction on Cheng Jinying

item.description: Narcissus tableware # An experienmental projects which was inspired by nature growth. We tried to combined the tableware design together with the nature plant curving forms, to find some more new possibilities.

Dumpling # Dumpling is a product- service system by providing migrant people with a recycled travel suitcase with changable bags, to offer them with more convenient and decent travel experience. After usage, migrant people can return their bags to the bag-recycle station in railyway station.

Paperboat Action # The “Paperboat Action” is an activity planned and designed by our group members by using Design Thinking methods after carrying a one-month research in a migrant children school, targeting at promoting “Quality Education”, one of the United Nation’s 17 sustainable development goals. Equality in education has always been a highly contro- versial topic, recently the United Nation has just proposed 17 sustainable development goals, one of which is ‘Quality Education’ .

the Field, cup series # The “Magnetic Field” series of Starbucks Cups is a commercial project between Tongji and Starbucks, but it did not put into market. The theme of the project is “Hundred Family Names 百家姓”, and the magnetic field means that with Starbucks as the center, different groups of people with different names are connected through magnetic force and attracted to each other. By decomposing the brand value and design language, we set main visual color tone and main figure - line and circle, to combine with different cups.

VOCONO # Vocono is a small glass-made ashtray. The change in the thickness of the inner wall creates an optical illusion, forming the visual effect of the smoke ash falling slowly. Its form is like a small volcano. When the user puts the cigarette on top, the smoke that rises up slowly is full of poetry and interest.

Weed # Weed is an easy-charging lighting product which aims at “providing users with agile and convenient lighting”. At the same time, by using the traditional Chinese imagery it arises people’s emotions towards nature and connects this feeling together with people’s daily lives. My inspiration comes from early childhood. The dogtail grass (毛毛草) is the most memorial part in Chinese people’s early lives. During when children often ran outdoor with it in their hands.

Fonts Garden # Based on Pro. Zhou Hongtao’s art installation project. I created this visual pattern by connecting each letter together according to their forms. The whole looks like a distorted dreamland, and at the same time like a floor plan of a Chinese garden

Intimate Law # The law and principle are always something which seems to be hard to get close to. Like the legislation, the rule of human society, the principle of social order which you cannot violate. Horrible terrifying. While this law, if we use a different perspective to see, in nature growth and human body evolution, what you can see is the sequence of gene. It’s soft and intimate while it’s also called” law”.

Land Scar # “Rethink about the bond between youself and nature.” “ Landscar ” is a conceptual art installation project proposal, aiming at evoking people’s reflection on the relationship between nature and themselves. Idea came during one of my outings, when I found many wild mushrooms growing from tree trunks and from ground. Why are they there? What do they mean to me – these mushrooms and bug bite holes?

The Fictional # Some fiction sketches I did, trying to seek for the promising future together with the possible co-existence of fine art, advanced technology, visible morality and architecture. What could be human’s life be like in the next 500 years? We are all familiar with Jules Gabriel Verne ’s wonderful science fiction novels, we often regard these as “impossible” scenarios. But these novels also provide people with a bunch of possibilities of living under different conditions, fighting with their own weakness and in pursuit for self-evolution.

BRead # BRead is an art and culture communication platform that brings audience, artists and curators together to lessen the distance between ordinary people and elegant art experiences. Inspired by the famous German artist Joseph Beuys: “Every man is an artist.” He believes that art comes from life and should return to life. How- ever, in contrast to the great division between art and life today, many people think that art is only something which the high-class people can afford.

Side Pocket # The online lab reservation system in our school was really poor designed and annoying. The students who want to use lab have to reserve online from an online platform, while they’ve complained many times for its poor work flow structure design and invisible reviewing status. In order to slove this problem, I designed the app Side Pocket. It is an online platform made for booking laboratories, equipements online.
